basic_spam_classifier.descriptions: A minimalist spam SMS detector built on independence tests and the Naive Bayes algorithm, developed as a mathematics textbook practice project.
basic_spam_classifier.title: Basic Spam Text Classifier

jiu_tian.descriptions: The class anthem for Class 9, High School Class of 2026, at <dfn><abbr title="High School Affiliated to Renmin University of China">RDFZ</abbr></dfn>. The song was primarily composed and arranged by our class monitor, Shan Tiyu. I had the honor of co-composing and arranging the harmonies.
jiu_tian.title: 九天 (Jǐu Tiān)

jiu_tian_rhapsody.descriptions: A orchestral rhapsody inspired by the song Jǐu Tiān. Not really a “Prelude”. This was my very first released work, composed during my first year of high school.
jiu_tian_rhapsody.title: 九天序曲 (Jǐu Tiān Prelude)

r3d.descriptions: The <dfn><abbr title="High School Affiliated to Renmin University of China">RDFZ</abbr></dfn> Digital Campus Project, mainly powered by Unity.
r3d.title: Eternal RDFZ

ran_wan.descriptions: An official entry for the 20th RDFZ Film Festival. It was the only film in the competition to feature extensive original scoring that deeply resonated with the narrative, ultimately winning the Best Original Music Award.
ran_wan.title: 燃晚 (Rán Wǎn)
